awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome packages, articles, and other cool resources from the Wagtail community.
awesomeList.description: A curated list of awesome packages, articles, and other cool resources from the Wagtail community.

nodes.itemHTML: • Wagtail Transferstars43 - An official extension for Wagtail allowing content to be transferred between multiple instances of a Wagtail project

• Wagtail bootstrap blogstars275 - A Wagtail blog which has Bootstrap theme, supports writing in Markdown, Latex. It also has comment workflow, comment form supports Mention and Emoji. Frontend is built by Webpack, Babel and SCSS.
• Wagtail react blogstars40 - SPA blog built with React, Bootstrap4, Storybook and Wagtail Rest API. It also supports headless preview.
• wagtail-webpack-dokkustars1 - A template with Wagtail, Webpack using django-webpack-loader, Bootstrap 5, production ready for Dokku.
• WesternFriendstars22 - community website with directory, ecommerce, and online subscription
• Wagtail Yoaststars8 - A tool to improve readability of your texts with SEO recommendations.
• Wagtail SVGstars15 - A Wagtail module for managing SVG files within the admin.
• Wagtail Trashstars11 - Will place pages in a trash can from where they can be restored instead of being permanently deleted.
• Serafeim's Wagtail FAQstars4 - Answers and recipes for Wagtail
• Wagtail Image Importstars5 - A plugin for importing images from Google Drive.
• Wagtail Content Importstars19 - Import content from Google Docs or Docx into StreamFields, using a customisable mapping system.

• wagtail-generic-chooserstars77 - provides base classes for building chooser popups and form widgets for the Wagtail admin, matching the look and feel of Wagtail's built-in choosers for pages, documents, snippets and images.
• Federal Election Commissionstars68 – The content management system (CMS) for the new Federal Election Commission website.
• wagtail-meta-previewstars17 - Adds ability to get share previews for Facebook, Twitter and Google in the Wagtail admin.
• PythonEatsTail - Complete written and video tutorials to create a Wagtail site with multiple languages, authentication and more
• wagtail-color-panelstars17 - Introduces panels for selecting colors in Wagtail.
• Wagtail Simple Captchastars0 - A self-hosted alternative to Wagtail ReCaptcha that easily integrates a django-simple-captchastars1.2k field into the Wagtail form builder.
• wagtail-multi-uploadstars2 - allows uploading of multiple related images for a page.
• How to Create and Manage Menus of Wagtail application
• Wagtail Cache Blockstars4 - A templatetag which add HTML fragment cache to your StreamField block
• wagtail-admin-list-controlsstars21 - Adds advanced search, ordering and layout controls to Wagtail's modeladmin list views.
• Django Chat: Wagtail CMS - Tom Dyson - An interview with Tom Dyson on Wagtail, the leading Django-based CMS used by tens of thousands of organizations including Google, NASA, and the British NHS.
• wagtail-redirect-importerstars15 - Your friendly neighborhood importer that lets you import redirects from different tabular data formats, such as .csv and .xls
• wagtail-contact-replystars20 - Reply directly to form submissions from the Wagtail admin

• Django Cookiecutter Wagtailstars26 – A Django Cookiecutter template with Wagtail. Based on the original 'Django Cookiecutter'. Features: Docker support using docker-compose for development and production (using Traefik with LetsEncrypt support), customizable PostgreSQL version, Bootstrap 4, media storage using Amazon S3 or Google Cloud Storage and many more.
• Consumer Financial Protection Bureaustars167 – The source code of the Wagtail-powered consumerfinance.gov is available here on GitHub.
• wagtail-opengraph-image-generatorstars18 - Assists you in automatically creating Open Graph images for your Wagtail pages.
• Wagtail Resumestars34 – A Wagtail project made to simplify creation of resumes for developers.
• wagtail-leaflet-widgetstars11 - A Leaflet JS - OSM based wagtail geo-location widget.
• Writing (code) for authors – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Brian Smith & Eric Sherman. Slides.
• Saving Lives With Wagtail: Recovery Meetings Across the World – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Timothy Allen.
• Why we chose Wagtail for CodeRed CMS – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Vince Salvino.
• Building a Wagtail-based site and authoring environment with accessibility in mind – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Zarina Mustapha.
• Making Wagtail Accessible – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Thibaud Colas. Slides.
• Everyone can fly a flag – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Will Barton. Slides.
• Architecting for a multi-domain site – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Ben Beecher. Slides.
• Contributions can be more than code – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Kalob Taulien.
• Thoughtful Code Review – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Naomi Morduch Toubman. Slides.
• Solving your problems by spelunking the Wagtail code – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Harris Lapiroff. Slides
• The State of Wagtail: 2019 – Wagtail Space US 2019 by Tom Dyson.
• Wagtail-Lazyimagesstars18 - A plugin that generates tiny blurry placeholder images for lazy loading Wagtail images medium.com style.
• Wagtail Pipitstars119 – Pipit is a Wagtail boilerplate which aims to provide an easy and modern developer workflow with a React-rendered frontend.
• Wagtail UI Plusstars42 - Several UI improvements to the Wagtail editor interface for StreamFields and StreamBlocks.
• Wagtail Live Previewstars26 - Live page previews beside your content.
• Wagtail Import/Export Toolstars9 - Refactor of Wagtail Import Exportstars31. This tool supports importing/exporting images, documents, and snippets that are used on imported/exported pages.
• wagtail-instance-selectorstars35 - A ForeignKey widget to create and select related items. Similar to Django's raw_id_fields.
• Drupal Front End WTF, Wagtail Front End FTW - Comparing Drupal and Wagtail Markup and approach to each CMS
• How to Deploy Wagtail to Google App Engine - Focus is Google Cloud Platform but a great introduction on how to get Wagtail up and running in their PAAS.
• How to Add Buttons to ModelAdmin Index View
• How to Prevent Users from Creating Pages by Type
• How Do I Wagtail? - Mozilla's editor facing guide for how to use Wagtail's admin interface. Source for this hosted on Mozilla's Github
• Wagtail Blocksstars43 - A Collection of awesome Wagtail CMS stream-field blocks and Charts.
• SecureDropstars36 – Wagtail-powered website of the SecureDrop whistleblower document submission system.
• Wagtail-Textractstars24 - Make Wagtail search Documents contents (PDF, Excel and Word, etc.).
• The State of Wagtail – Wagtail Space 2019 by Tom Dyson.
• Image rotation feature – Wagtail Space 2019 by Chris Adams. Code.
• Debug templates – Wagtail Space 2019 by Coen van der Kamp.
• Wagtail Headless with HATEOAS – Wagtail Space 2019 by Duco Dokter.
• Building a Planet Friendly Web (with Wagtail) – Wagtail Space 2019 by Chris Adams.
• [WIP] The future of (rich text) authoring experiences in Wagtail – Wagtail Space 2019 by Thibaud Colas.
• Wagtail & Whatsapp – Wagtail Space 2019 by Lisa Adams & Codie Roelf.
• Slack2Wagtail – Wagtail Space 2019 by Coen van der Kamp & Lucas Moeskops.
• Wagtail and Oscar – Wagtail Space 2019 by Lars van de Kerkhof.
• wagtail-textract – Wagtail Space 2019 by Kees Hink. Codestars24.
• Django 2.2 compatibility – Wagtail Space 2019 by Matt Wescott.
• SEO dashboard – Wagtail Space 2019 by Janneke Janssen. Codestars16.
• My First Wagtail Contribution – More formats in RichText Editor – Wagtail Space 2019 by Arifin Ibne Matin.
• Fly, Wagtail, fly! – Wagtail Space 2019 by Daniele Procida.
• Wagtail & GraphQL – Wagtail Space 2019 by Arthur Bayr.
• Learn Wagtail - Regular video tutorials about all aspects of Wagtail.
• Wagtail: когда хочется чего-то приятнее, чем просто Django – Moscow Python Conf++ 2018 by Игорь Мосягин
• Puput - Puput is a powerful and simple Django app to manage a blog. It uses the awesome Wagtail CMS as content management system.
• wagtail-autocompletestars70 - Autocompleting choosers for ForeignKey, ParentalKey, and ManyToMany fields.

• Présentation de Wagtail, le dernier CMS Django - Wagtail est un CMS relativement récent dans l’écosystème Django. Pour autant, son jeune âge ne l’empêche pas de posséder de nombreuses fonctionnalités que nous découvrirons dans cet article.
• Adding document previews to Wagtail CMS
• Introducing Draft.js in Wagtail – Wagtail Space 2018 by Thibaud Colas. Presentation.
• Made with Wagtail - A showcase of sites and apps made with Wagtail CMS.
• PyPI - Python Package Index - Wagtail packages on the Python Package Index.
• Dutch Wagtail Meetup - This is a group for anyone interested in working and developing with Wagtail.
• Wellington Wagtail CMS Meetup - The first Wagtail CMS meetup in New Zealand!
• Wagtail Space - Wagtail training sessions, Wagtail (lightning) talks and a Wagtail sprint. From March 13th until 15th 2019, Wagtail Space takes place in Arnhem, The Netherlands.
• Wagtail in 2018 – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Tom Dyson.
• What the Wagtail Docs Don't Tell You – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Lacey Williams Henschel.
• Django Logging for Wagtail – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Ryan Sullivan.
• Scaling Wagtail for 100 Million Girls – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Lisa Adams and Codie Roelf.
• Using Wagtail to Fight for Press Freedom – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Harris Lapiroff.
• Choosing Wagtail for Columbia University – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Zarina Mustapha.
• Running a Multi-Site Newsroom in Wagtail – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Ryan Verner.
• Wagtail in the Cloud – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Daniele Procida.

• Learning Wagtail – Wagtail Space US 2018 by Dawn Wages.

• Wagtail Orderablestars40 - Mixin support for drag-and-drop ordering in admin panel.
• Wagtail GraphQLstars37 - App to automatically add GraphQL support to a Wagtail website.
• Wagtail Cachestars57 - A simple page cache for Wagtail using the Django cache middleware.
• Migrating your Drupal content to Wagtail
• Amplify a Wagtail/Django site - Prepare you Wagtail site for Accelerated Mobile Pages (AMP).
• Wagtail Foliagestars14 - Utilities for programmatically building page trees in Wagtail.
• Wagtail Tutorials: Build Blog Step by Step - The tutorials teach you how to create a standard blog from scratch step by step.
• Python CMS Framework Review: Wagtail vs Django-CMS - Talk about the difference between Django-CMS and Wagtail, the two most popular CMS framework in Python world.

• CodeRed CMSstars397 - a professionally supported WordPress alternative for building marketing websites. Create pages, blogs, forms, and every Bootstrap 4 component in the wagtail admin out-of-the-box! Learn more or watch the lightning talk.
• Wagtail Tag Managerstars48 - A Wagtail addon that allows for easier and GDPR compliant administration of scripts and tags.
• Project TIERstars9 – Teaching Integrity in Empirical Research.
• Snotra_RSSstars10 - Snotra_RSS is an Atom and RSS news aggregator app for Wagtail.
• wagtail-readinglevelstars15 – Wagtail plugin to determine the reading level of text input into a rich text field.
• Wagtail FontAwesome - Add FontAwesome icons to StreamField.
• BVSPCAstars6 – Bow Valley SPCA website.
• Wagtail Error Pages - Pretty, smart, customizable error pages for Wagtail.
• Wagtail Code Blockstars95 - StreamField code blocks for the Wagtail CMS with real-time PrismJS Syntax Highlighting.
• UWKM Streamfieldsstars29 – A basic set of Wagtail StreamField blocks for fun and profit.
• Wagtail & Agile – Wagtail Space 2017 by Edd Baldry.
• Deploy Wagtail to the Divio Cloud – Wagtail Space 2017 by Daniele Procida.
• All about Wagtail – Wagtail Space 2017 by Robin van der Rijst.
• Presenting Wagtail Clear StreamField, a modular StreamField app – Wagtail Space 2017 by Edd Baldry.
• Wagtail Experiments, easy A/B testing for your Wagtail sites – Wagtail Space 2017 by Tom Dyson.
• Wagtail's preview, a new hope – Wagtail Space 2017 by Bertrand Bordage.
• The Zen of Wagtail – Wagtail Space 2017 by Matt Westcott.
• Plone to Wagtail – Wagtail Space 2017 by Coen van der Kamp.
• Hundreds of Wagtail in Flight – Wagtail Space 2017 by Simon de Haan.
• Draftail extensions – custom entities tutorial - Step-by-step tutorial to make extensions for Draftail.

• Wagtail Wednesdays #01 - Adding Help Text to Improve Wagtail Editor Experience - Catherine talks you through the steps you can take to add some useful supplementary text fields to the Wagtail admin.

• Wagtail Wednesdays #02 - Customising Rich Text Features in Wagtail - Catherine talks you through the steps you can take to customise your rich text editors to control which features are available to your content editors.
• Wagtail Wednesdays #03 - Using tabs to create a cleaner admin interface - Chris talks you through using tabs to organise fields.
• Wagtail Wednesdays #04 - Organising Images and Documents using Wagtail Collections - Kieran talks you through the process of organising your images and documents into collections.

• Wagtail Wednesdays #05 - How to organise your fields and streamline the editor experience - Chelsea talks you through the process of organising your fields to make it easier to manage them and streamline the editor experience.
• Wagtail Wednesdays #06 - Creating & using custom settings in your wagtail site - Chris talks you through setting up and using custom site settings.

• Wagtail Wednesdays #07 - How to Enable the Wagtail Styleguide - It’s a really helpful resource that takes no time at all to enable and it allows you to check your components against the guidelines and shows all the available Wagtail icons.
• Upgrading to Wagtail 2.0 – Wagtail 2.0 is one of our biggest releases to date.
• Getting started with Draftail extensions – Do you want to write extensions for Draftail? This is a good place to start.
• PyPI classifiers for Wagtail
• Wagtail-Netlifystars71 - Easilly publish your statically rendered Wagtail site to Netlify.
• Wagtail App Pagesstars22 - Extend Wagtail pages using an actual URL config and django views.
• Wagtail Import Exportstars31 - Import/Export pages between Wagtail instances.

• Podcast.init Episode 58 - Wagtail with Tom Dyson - In this episode Tom Dyson explains how Wagtail came to be created, what sets it apart from other options, and when you should implement it for your projects.

• Things i learned at Wagtail Space – Wagtail Space 2018 by Codie Roelf.
• Fly Wagtail to a PyCon – Wagtail Space 2018 by Daniele Procida.
• Wagtail Performance – Wagtail Space 2018 by Michael van Tellingen. Code.
• Mutliple images uploader – Wagtail Space 2018 by Rajeev J Sebastian.
• Wagtail Space easter egg team demo – Wagtail Space 2018 by Lars. Codestars0.
• Wagtail Space 2019 – Wagtail Space 2018 by Maarten Kling.

• Getting Started With Wagtail - Working extensively with Wagtail and the surrounding community, we have discovered a range of common pitfalls developers run into when beginning to deliver with Wagtail.
• Deploying Wagtail In Production
• Setting Up Foundation Sass With Wagtail
• Wagtail’s first hatch – Kickstarter campaign to accelerate the development of Wagtail.
• Joyousstars56 - A calendar application for Wagtail.
• wagtail-2fastars57 - Add two-factor authentication to Wagtail by integrating it with django-otp.
• Code blocks for Wagtail using Pygments
• Wagtail — еще одна CMS на Django by Mikalai Radchuk - This talk is an introduction to Wagtail in Russian.
• django-oscar-wagtailstars81 - Wagtail integration for Oscar Commerce (or Oscar Commerce integration for Wagtail?).

• Getting started in Wagtail, a newcomer's perspective - Having used Drupal almost exclusively as my main tool of choice for a while now, I was asked to put together a build using Wagtail. By @kiwimind.
• Wagtail screencasts: Creating and displaying pages in Wagtail - This video will show you how to create and display pages using the Wagtail CMS.
• wagtailstreamformsstars124 - Build forms in Wagtail's admin for use in streamfields.

• Wagtail Personalisationstars98 - Personalisation module, enabling editors to create customised pages - or parts of pages - based on segments whose rules are configured directly in the admin interface.
• Wagtail Medium Editorstars17 - A customizable Medium Editor for Wagtail, with link anchors support.
• Wagtail-bakerystars129 - A set of helpers for baking your Django Wagtail site out as flat files.
• Wagtail FilePreviewsstars19 - Extend Wagtail's Documents with image previews and metadata from FilePreviews.io.

• Wagtail Gridderstars54 - Grid card layout similar to Google image search results, with an expanded area for card details.
• Wagtail ClearStreamstars32 - An app to make Wagtail's StreamField more modular.
• longclawstars283 - A shop template for Wagtail CMS.

• wagtail-markdownstars111 - Markdown fields and blocks for Wagtail.

• wagtail-schema.orgstars51 - Schema.org JSON-LD tags for Wagtail sites.

• DjangoCon US 2015 - Wagtail - Yet Another Django CMS by Tom Dyson - Tom will explain why his agency decided to build a new CMS, share some lessons learned in running a growing open source project, and outline Wagtail's roadmap to version 2 and beyond. Slide deck.
• Wagtail SVGmapstars11 - ImageMap functionality for Wagtail through inline SVGs.
• Wagtail Themesstars73 - Site-specific theme loader for Wagtail.

• PyCon Australia – Comparing Wagtail, Django CMS and Mezzanine by Adam Brenecki – This talk explores the different approaches, strengths and weaknesses of each CMS, and what they mean for you as a developer and for your content editors.

• DjangoCon US 2016 - Atomic Wagtail by Kurt Wall – Brad Frost's atomic design principles are taking the way we design the web by storm. I'll explain what Wagtail is, how you can use it with atomic design principles, and some hurdles you might run into along the way with suggestions on how to help.

• Wagtail ReCaptchastars42 - wagtail-django-captcha provides an easy way to integrate the django-recaptchastars757 field when using the Wagtail formbuilder.
